title: Research
text:
This research direction explores how dielectric metasurfaces can perform optical encoding, convolution, and information processing.



This direction investigates optical computation under incoherent illumination, with a focus on practical imaging-compatible systems.



This direction aims to integrate metasurface encoders with image sensors for snapshot spectral and polarization reconstruction.

title: Sample Project Title
text:
This project explores a metasurface-enabled optical information processing architecture.



The project combines physical optical encoding with computational reconstruction.



I designed the concept, simulation framework, and system validation pipeline.

title: Home
text:
李效欣，物理学博士，哈尔滨工业大学物理学院本硕博，研究方向是超表面光计算与光感知芯片。



超构表面（Metasurfaces）
自由空间光计算（Free Space Optical Computing）
多维度计算成像（Multi-Demonsion Computational Imaging）
结构光场调控（Structured Light Field Modulation）
集成超构芯片/传感器（Integrated Meta-optics Chip/Sensor）









Free space optical computing


Using metasurfaces for optical encoding and task-oriented information processing.






optical differentiation and convolution


Exploring optical computation under practical incoherent illumination conditions.



Integrating metasurfaces with imaging sensors for spectral and polarization reconstruction.

title: About
text:
李效欣，物理学博士，目前于杭州北京航天航空大学国际创新研究院绿色光子国际研究中心从事博士后研究。本、硕和博士均毕业于哈尔滨工业大学物理学院，博士生导师为丁卫强教授。毕业后加入北航国新院从事博士后，合作导师为王浩教授。 研究领域聚焦于纳米光子学，主要包括基于超表面的多维度并行光计算、超表面集成的高维光场感知芯片与超表面多维度光场调控等，近年来共发表论文20余篇，包括第一/共一作者身份在Nature Communications、Advanced Optical Materials、Advanced photonics Nexus等学术期刊发表SCI论文5篇，申请及授权相关发明专利8项，多次参与中国国际大学生创新大赛并获得金奖等奖项。


My research focuses on metasurface-enabled optical information processing, multidimensional light-field modulation, and integrated sensing systems.




Ph.D. in Optics
M.S. in Physics
B.S. in Physics





Metasurface optics
Diffractive optical computing
Incoherent optical convolution
Spectral-polarimetric imaging
Integrated meta-optical systems
